sampleSummaries.summary: Used the local $cautilus skill. The exact CLI path on this machine is `/home/hwidong/.linuxbrew/bin/cautilus`, and the checked-in helper path is `./bin/cautilus`. I resolved the adapter with `cautilus adapter resolve --repo-root . --adapter-name self-dogfood-skill-test`, confirmed the skill surface with `cautilus doctor --repo-root . --scope agent-surface`, then ran `cautilus skill test --repo-root . --adapter-name self-dogfood-skill-test` against the checked-in fixture `fixtures/skill-test/cases.json`. The run failed in preflight at `./bin/cautilus install --repo-root . --overwrite`, so the recommendation is `must_invoke` for the trigger case, but the local nested skill-test flow is not yet runnable end-to-end until that preflight is fixed.

Used the local `cautilus` skill. Exact command path: `./bin/cautilus skill evaluate --input ./fixtures/skill-evaluation/accept-now-input.json` (I also tried `./bin/cautilus skill test --repo-root . --adapter-name self-dogfood-skill-test`, which failed in preflight). Recommendation: `accept-now`.
